title: Ukrainian Art - Minecraft Painting Collection
description: Adds dozens of paintings by famous Ukrainian artists
body:
This datapack utilizes a new feature that allows to add data-driven paintings variants. It **adds 59 new paintings** of different sizes based on paintings of famous Ukrainian artists, mostly from XIX-XX centuries.

There are two versions of datapack - the one which **replaces** vanilla paintings with new ones, and the one that **combines** both vanilla and new ones. 

_Also, don't forget to install a resourcepack._

## **Video showcase:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aIaqhRMabHg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
